parsed.production_notes: The character's face has an unnatural, smoothed appearance typical of AI generation. The lip-sync is slightly off, and the backgrounds in both scenes are completely static with no ambient movement.

characters.appearance: Young woman, slim build, fair complexion, long red hair, green eyes. She has a symmetrical face with a smooth, flawless appearance.
characters.wardrobe: In the first scene, she wears a grey tank top. In the second scene, she wears a light blue shirt with a black apron.
characters.demeanor: Friendly and encouraging, but with slightly stiff and repetitive body language.

scenes.setting: Bedroom, daytime, white sheets, soft lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is lying on her side on a bed with white sheets. She is wearing a grey tank top. Her head is resting on her left hand. The background is blurred, showing a softly lit bedroom. The lighting is warm and even. She is looking directly at the camera and speaking.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a close-up of Character A lying in bed, speaking directly to the viewer. Large, stylized text overlays appear in the center of the screen, highlighting key words from her speech. The text has a black outline and some words are colored green.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: The best way to improve your speaking is to practice every day, and that's exactly what I'm here for.
Character A says: I'm Loora, your AI English tutor.
Character A says: With me, you can practice anytime, anywhere, just like you would with a real person.
Character A says: I'll chat with you, give you instant feedback on your pronunciation, and help you get better with every conversation.
Character A says: It's fast, easy, and without stress.
Character A says: You don't have to worry about making mistakes because I'll guide you through them.
Character A says: Let's practice together every day and you'll see how quickly your English improves.
scenes.on_screen_text: The best way to improve your speaking is to practice every day, and that's exactly what I'm here for. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor. With me, you can practice anytime, anywhere, just like you would with a real person. I'll chat with you, give you instant feedback on your pronunciation, and help you get better with every conversation. It's fast, easy, and without stress. You don't have to worry about making mistakes because I'll guide you through them. Let's practice together every day and you'll see how quickly your English improves.

scenes.setting: Cafe, daytime, blurred background with lights and a menu board.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is standing in a cafe. She is wearing a light blue shirt under a black apron. Her hair is tied back in a low ponytail. The background is a blurred cafe setting with warm pendant lights and a menu board. She is looking directly at the camera, gesturing with her hands as she speaks.

scenes.visual_description: The scene transitions to Character A standing in a cafe, acting as a barista. She continues to speak directly to the camera. The same style of text overlays appears in the center of the screen, emphasizing her words.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Hi, I'm Loora.
Character A says: Imagine you're here in a café, ready to order in English.
Character A says: It can feel a little scary, right?
Character A says: But with me, you can practice every situation before it happens.
Character A says: I'll show you how to order your coffee, how to ask simple questions, and how to feel confident speaking to anyone.
Character A says: No books, no stress - just natural conversation, like talking to a friend.
Character A says: And the more you practice with me, the easier it becomes when you're out in the real world.
Character A says: So, let's start practicing together today, and in 3 weeks you will speak with confidence..
scenes.on_screen_text: Hi, I'm Loora. Imagine you're here in a café, ready to order in English. It can feel a little scary, right? But with me, you can practice every situation before it happens. I'll show you how to order your coffee, how to ask simple questions, and how to feel confident speaking to anyone. No books, no stress - just natural conversation, like talking to a friend. And the more you practice with me, the easier it becomes when you're out in the real world. So, let's start practicing together today, and in 3 weeks you will speak with confidence..
